description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, slightly sloped roof covered in dark tiles. The exterior is clad in wood paneling, giving it a warm, contemporary appearance. Large rectangular windows dominate the front facade, allowing for ample natural light and a strong connection to the outdoors. One side of the house features a spacious balcony with a glass railing, supported by metal posts, providing an elevated outdoor living area. The rear and side elevations are more minimal, with fewer and smaller windows, emphasizing privacy. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on horizontal lines and open spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with wood paneling, large windows, and a spacious balcony with glass railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two stories, large windows, and the main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive balcony with glass railing and supporting columns.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a clear view of the wood-paneled exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with only two small windows and uninterrupted wood paneling.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no visible steps, and a minimal overhang; clean and unornamented.
